\tzpentry{ID3553}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3553 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ I(\ell_\varphi) = \int \psi_1^*(\mathbf{r})\,\delta(\mathbf{r})\,\psi_2(\mathbf{r})\,d^3r \]
